title: AFN Releases Agenda for 2023 Convention
summary: ANCHORAGE, AK – The Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) has announced the agenda for its upcoming 2023 Annual Convention, which will be held in Anchorage on October 19-21, 2023, at the Dena’ina Civic and Convention Center.
